activities.name: Run Until start date equals to end date

additionalHeaders.value:
@concat('Authorization: Bearer ', activity('Get Access Token').output.access_token,'
Content-Type: application/soap+xml;charset=UTF-8
Content-Length: 649
Connection: Keep-Alive
User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.1.1 (java 1.5)
')

activities.name: Copy Latest Data To Synapse Stage Table

dependsOn.activity: Insert from stage to final table

activities.name: Insert from stage to final table

scripts.text:
insert into [rpy].[Projects_Data] 
(ATTRIBUTE1,ATTRIBUTE10,ATTRIBUTE10_DATE,ATTRIBUTE10_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE11,ATTRIBUTE11_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE11_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE12,ATTRIBUTE12_DATE,ATTRIBUTE12_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE13,ATTRIBUTE13_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE13_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE14,ATTRIBUTE14_DATE,ATTRIBUTE14_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE15,ATTRIBUTE15_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE15_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE16,ATTRIBUTE17,ATTRIBUTE18,ATTRIBUTE19,ATTRIBUTE1_DATE,ATTRIBUTE1_NUMBER,
ATTRIBUTE2,ATTRIBUTE20,ATTRIBUTE21,ATTRIBUTE22,ATTRIBUTE23,ATTRIBUTE24,ATTRIBUTE25,ATTRIBUTE26,
ATTRIBUTE27,ATTRIBUTE28,ATTRIBUTE29,ATTRIBUTE2_DATE,ATTRIBUTE2_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE3,ATTRIBUTE30,
ATTRIBUTE31,ATTRIBUTE32,ATTRIBUTE33,ATTRIBUTE34,ATTRIBUTE35,ATTRIBUTE36,ATTRIBUTE37,ATTRIBUTE38,
ATTRIBUTE39,ATTRIBUTE3_DATE,ATTRIBUTE3_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE4,ATTRIBUTE40,ATTRIBUTE41,ATTRIBUTE42,
ATTRIBUTE43,ATTRIBUTE44,ATTRIBUTE45,ATTRIBUTE46,ATTRIBUTE47,ATTRIBUTE48,ATTRIBUTE49,ATTRIBUTE4_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE4_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE5,ATTRIBUTE50,ATTRIBUTE5_DATE,ATTRIBUTE5_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE6,ATTRIBUTE6_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE6_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE7,ATTRIBUTE7_DATE,ATTRIBUTE7_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE8,ATTRIBUTE8_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE8_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE9,ATTRIBUTE9_DATE,ATTRIBUTE9_NUMBER,ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
CARRYING_OUT_ORGANIZATION_ID,CLOSED_DATE,COMPLETION_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_FROM_PROJECT_ID,
CREATION_DATE,DESCRIPTION,LANGUAGE,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,NAME,ORG_ID,PROJECT_CURRENCY_CODE,PROJECT_ID,PROJECT_STATUS_CODE,PROJECT_TYPE,
PROJECT_TYPE_ID,PROJECT_UNIT_ID,SEGMENT1,START_DATE,TEMPLATE_END_DATE_ACTIVE,TEMPLATE_FLAG,
TEMPLATE_START_DATE_ACTIVE,source_name,sub_source_name,created_date_time)
select a.ATTRIBUTE1,a.ATTRIBUTE10,a.ATTRIBUTE10_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE10_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE11,a.ATTRIBUTE11_DATE,a.
ATTRIBUTE11_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE12,a.ATTRIBUTE12_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE12_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE13,a.ATTRIBUTE13_DATE,a.
ATTRIBUTE13_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE14,a.ATTRIBUTE14_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE14_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE15,a.ATTRIBUTE15_DATE,a.
ATTRIBUTE15_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE16,a.ATTRIBUTE17,a.ATTRIBUTE18,a.ATTRIBUTE19,a.ATTRIBUTE1_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE1_NUMBER,a.
ATTRIBUTE2,a.ATTRIBUTE20,a.ATTRIBUTE21,a.ATTRIBUTE22,a.ATTRIBUTE23,a.ATTRIBUTE24,a.ATTRIBUTE25,a.ATTRIBUTE26,a.
ATTRIBUTE27,a.ATTRIBUTE28,a.ATTRIBUTE29,a.ATTRIBUTE2_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE2_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE3,a.ATTRIBUTE30,a.
ATTRIBUTE31,a.ATTRIBUTE32,a.ATTRIBUTE33,a.ATTRIBUTE34,a.ATTRIBUTE35,a.ATTRIBUTE36,a.ATTRIBUTE37,a.ATTRIBUTE38,a.
ATTRIBUTE39,a.ATTRIBUTE3_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE3_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE4,a.ATTRIBUTE40,a.ATTRIBUTE41,a.ATTRIBUTE42,a.
ATTRIBUTE43,a.ATTRIBUTE44,a.ATTRIBUTE45,a.ATTRIBUTE46,a.ATTRIBUTE47,a.ATTRIBUTE48,a.ATTRIBUTE49,a.ATTRIBUTE4_DATE,a.
ATTRIBUTE4_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE5,a.ATTRIBUTE50,a.ATTRIBUTE5_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE5_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE6,a.ATTRIBUTE6_DATE,a.
ATTRIBUTE6_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE7,a.ATTRIBUTE7_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE7_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE8,a.ATTRIBUTE8_DATE,a.
ATTRIBUTE8_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE9,a.ATTRIBUTE9_DATE,a.ATTRIBUTE9_NUMBER,a.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,a.
CARRYING_OUT_ORGANIZATION_ID,a.CLOSED_DATE,a.COMPLETION_DATE,a.CREATED_BY,a.CREATED_FROM_PROJECT_ID,a.
CREATION_DATE,a.DESCRIPTION,a.LANGUAGE,a.LAST_UPDATED_BY,a.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,a.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,a.
LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,a.NAME,a.ORG_ID,a.PROJECT_CURRENCY_CODE,a.PROJECT_ID,a.PROJECT_STATUS_CODE,a.PROJECT_TYPE,a.
PROJECT_TYPE_ID,a.PROJECT_UNIT_ID,a.SEGMENT1,a.START_DATE,a.TEMPLATE_END_DATE_ACTIVE,a.TEMPLATE_FLAG,a.
TEMPLATE_START_DATE_ACTIVE,a.source_name,a.sub_source_name,a.created_date_time
from [rpy].[Projects_Data_stage] a,
(select PROJECT_ID,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,max(ID) as ID 
from [rpy].[Projects_Data_stage]
group by PROJECT_ID,LAST_UPDATE_DATE) b
where a.PROJECT_ID = b.PROJECT_ID
and a.LAST_UPDATE_DATE = b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE

activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters_to_lookup_dates
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

dependsOn.activity: Copy Latest Data To Synapse Stage Table

scripts.text: delete from [rpy].[Projects_Data_stage] where PROJECT_ID is NULL

delete [rpy].[Projects_Data] 
from [rpy].[Projects_Data] a,
(select PROJECT_ID,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,max(ID) as ID 
from [rpy].[Projects_Data_stage]
group by PROJECT_ID,LAST_UPDATE_DATE) b
where a.PROJECT_ID = b.PROJECT_ID
and a.LAST_UPDATE_DATE = b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE

activities.name: Update Start Date with max LAST_UPDATE_DATE

dependsOn.activity: Run Until start date equals to end date
Run Until start date equals to end date
